textByHashes.68a1bfdb35dd0ebfe066828316da81701d20d648: I'm looking for a helmet. I know it's buried somewhere.
textByHashes.4afbc78fea947d312630dac9e942c62debd6cfe3: I don't know. I've tried everywhere else so it might be.
textByHashes.53385e51beeb24cecd121a871e4ff384a7218e24: Maybe you're right. I just don't know anymore.
textByHashes.35e3c1e60f46c7a55c68e0353ae7a4aedb2ab14f: Thank you. I just wish I had the helmet to go with it.
textByHashes.96372ac108e9f642df8edc55a86106c9b7a40b06: That helmet! Where did you get it?
textByHashes.ce0c4b0f5c36a25b5e1c799b061d94efde026b2f: I gave up on the last one. Who cares about that one, anyway?
textByHashes.8904b85383668f972801c4af245e5bc8039f9e04: So much nicer than the garb I had before, right?
textByHashes.6e25d1c5a9eabff4ef76632bee19ab9b0c85940a: I just wish I had the helmet to go with it.
